channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zimbabwe, Botswana vaccinate 72,000 cattle against FMD as South Africa battles outbreak control challenges

item.title: Zimpapers orders staff to return Chivayo cash gifts, gives presenter vehicle ultimatum @nehandaradio @wicknellchivayo
item.description: Zimbabwe Newspapers Group has instructed Capitalk FM staff to return most of the cash gifts distributed by businessman Wicknell Chivayo, while presenter Phathisani Sibanda has reportedly been told to reject a luxury vehicle offer or leave the company. The post Zimpapers orders st via Nehanda Radio #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Digital tools help curb stillbirth rates

item.title: Freight costs threaten Zimbabwe farmers’ livelihoods as Iran war disrupts exports
item.description: Reuters In a busy fresh-produce packaging facility in northern Harare, about 30 women ​in green dust coats and matching caps grade sugar snap peas destined for dinner tables ‌in Europe. The mood in the facility is cheerful, but the fresh produce export season has got off to a cha via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Tourism boost as Zimbabwe hosts Africa Skills Week
item.description: ZIMBABWE is poised to reap significant tourism benefits as it prepares to host the African Skills Week (ASW) later this year. African Skills Week is an annual African Union (AU) initiative aimed at transforming skills development, strengthening Technical and Vocational Education via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Millennium Heights apartments sell out fast as demand surges
item.description: Millennium Heights is rapidly taking shape, with construction progressing at pace on its planned 1,000 apartments and demand significantly outstripping supply. Block 6, comprising 65 units, sold out before construction had even begun and is now officially under development. Follo via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Social Intern — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Editor Intern — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Data Intern — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Harare’s 20 AI Robocop Traffic Cameras Will Start Fining Drivers In June 2026
item.description: Harare Motorists To Receive Digital Traffic Fines Under New AI System Harare motorists will begin facing fines from 20 artificial intelligence-powered “Robocop” traffic cameras starting in June 2026 after the Government confirmed that testing of the new smart enforcement system i via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News
